title: Scorch
description: Additional blocks, structures, and re-balancing for the nether
body:
Scorch is a mod which adds new content to the nether and rebalances nether gameplay, particularly netherite mining.



**World Generation**

- Gravel replaced by ironsand
- Build height increased
- Nether is slightly higher and slightly deeper
- Annoying lava deposits no longer exist underground

**Pyrack**

- New ore that drops gunpowder
- Can be ignited for chain reaction explosions
- Great for searching for debris underground

![a vein of pyrack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3abb182c0d3220191352f22a91c5d87854865e.png)

**Ignistone**

- Found deep underground near large deposits of ancient debris
- Turns into lava if mined without silk touch

![some ignistone near a patch of ancient debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513e4995b27f1da7a273b8a61057a23da3f23a81.png)

**Crying Obsidian**

- Creates ignistone when placed above a lava source
- Creates netherrack when placed above flowing lava

![crying obsidian creating ignistone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4baeea0721363da6e3bd309802a7620569cc4f4c_0.webp)

**Ironsand & Ironstone**

- New nether blockset
- Mining ironsand will give ironsand clumps or flint
- Ironsand clumps can be smelted into iron nuggets
- Ironsand clumps can be crafted back into ironsand
- Ironsand can be crafted into ironstone
- Ironsand be used to smelt glass
- Ironsand be used to craft TNT
- Ironstone comes with slab, stair, chiseled, and wall variants
- Ironstone can also be crafted into burial urns, but the burial urns will not contain anything

![the ironsand and ironstone block palate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5799de55c1c5b446eb6bdc7f60d873c2770a0e0.png)

**Crypts**

- New structure made of Ironstone that spawns deep underground
- Inhabited by wither skeletons
- Lots of loot inside, especially if you break the Burial Urns or dig up graves
- You can find Totems of Returning here
- Being caught disturbing the crypt by Possessed Ironstone will cause the player to build up a curse
- Curse build up will awaken more of the crypt and reduce your maximum HP
- Curse build up persists beyond death, but it will go away after some time or when a golden apple is eaten
- You can craft Possessed Ironstone using ghast tears

![the crypt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ca0845194d6bb0192d774c95cd14c5e0ef10e4_0.webp)

![health bar affected by cursed hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f36a9c078790ca6f5ba993a21e4f977d0bc5e4c.png)

_Thank you to SnakeBlock for the broken heart texture_

![possessed ironstone that is upset with the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3241f356c2af8ce5647f3075f7649ad7a052e360.png)

**Totem of Returning**

- Totems of Returning are a one-time use item which will safely teleport you to your spawn point when used
- Can be found in Burial Urns in Crypts

![totem of returning item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca1ccdb01fe051df14aca2923ed4a300cca9aa23.png)

**Striders**

- Striders can be sheared for string
- Strider hair can be styled with magma cream
- Striders will grow their hair back over time but this process can be accelerated using warped roots
- Striders will not grow their hair back if they are cold

![strider with curly hair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e964553b7bd6e1a356638f3a8cf99da0042b57.png)

**Misc Changes**

- Wither Skull and Nether Star item entities are immune to fire and lava
- Wither Skeletons have a 100% chance to drop a Wither Skull if killed by a ghast fireball
- Piglins give ironsand instead of gravel
- Water Bottles are craftable by adding a glass bottle and a ghast tear in the crafting menu
- Nether fog is nerfed so you can now see further

![view of the nether with the increased height and less fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d166c5711c619c46094bb9eb771f0bf9a8d0e27_0.webp)
